headline: Devon Energy Corporation (DVN) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
summary: Devon Energy (DVN) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: TD Cowen Maintains Hold on Devon Energy, Raises Price Target to $50
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Robert Hodges   maintains Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) with a Hold and raises the price target from $46 to $50.
